Is your university a public university or a private (foundation) university?

Is your university a public university or a private (foundation) university?

Turkish-Japanese Science and Technology University is a government university established in accordance with the agreement made between the Government of the Republic of Türkiye and the Government of Japan.

Where is your university located?

Where is your university located?

What is the language of instruction at your university?

The language of instruction at our university is English.

Which academic program and department will the university launch with?

Which academic program and department will the university launch with?

Our university will initially launch its academic activities at the doctoral level with the “Earthquake Disaster Science” program.
